---
title: "test_synapse_sync_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_synapse_sync_empire.py"
loc: 26
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.80
style_score: 3.66
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.99
---

## Intent
The `test_synapse_sync_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_push_rate_limiter, test_knowledge_extractor_corrections. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_push_rate_limiter, test_knowledge_extractor_corrections. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [src.synapse.synapse_sync](file://src.synapse.synapse_sync)

### Exports
- `test_push_rate_limiter`
- `test_knowledge_extractor_corrections`
